recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: Desperate to save their marriage, a young couple takes a deal to move into their dream home, but disturbing events reveal the house's troubled history.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: The Evil Next Door
recommendations.overview: A dad moves into a new house with his son and girlfriend. When he's out of town working, the son makes a new "friend" next doors.

recommendations.title: We Are What We Are
recommendations.overview: After the death of a patriarch, a family must try to continue on with a disturbing, ritualistic tradition.

recommendations.title: Exposed
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a miracle, a young Latina woman experiences strange things as a police detective searches for the truth behind his partner's death.

recommendations.title: In Too Deep
recommendations.overview: Drug lord Dwayne Gittens rules Cincinnati with an iron fist. No wonder he's known as "God" on the streets. Determined to break Gittens' stranglehold on the city is undercover cop Jeffrey Cole. But as Cole takes on an assumed identity to penetrate Git

recommendations.title: Walking Tall
recommendations.overview: A former U.S. soldier returns to his hometown to find it overrun by crime and corruption, which prompts him to clean house.

recommendations.title: The Open House
recommendations.overview: A teenager and his mother find themselves besieged by threatening forces when they move into a new house.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.

recommendations.title: The Others
